alambadi.care: Requires open grazing, regular vaccination, parasite control
alambadi.description: Alambadi is a draught breed used mainly for ploughing and transport. It is strong and well adapted to forest and hilly regions.

amritmahal.care: Needs regular exercise and proper shelter
amritmahal.description: Amritmahal is a famous draught breed known for its speed and endurance. Mainly used for agricultural work.

ayrshire.care: Requires good dairy management and hygiene
ayrshire.description: Ayrshire is a high milk-producing dairy breed known for good quality milk with moderate fat content.

gir.food: Green fodder, dry fodder, mineral mixture
gir.description: Gir is one of the best dairy breeds in India with high milk production and disease resistance.

hariana.description: Hariana is a dual-purpose breed used for both milk production and agricultural work.

kankrej.care: Proper nutrition and regular veterinary care
kankrej.description: Kankrej is a dual-purpose breed known for both milk production and draught work.
